titles.en: The meaning of the exalted moral character
The meaning of the exalted moral character

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن محمد، عن فضالة، عن أبان، عن أبي الجاورد، عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام في قول الله عز وجل: " إنك لعلى خلق العظيم " قال: هو الاسلام. وروي أن الخلق العظيم " هو " الدين العظيم.
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن محمد، عن فضالة، عن أبان، عن أبي الجاورد، عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام في قول الله عز وجل: " إنك لعلى خلق العظيم " قال: هو الاسلام. وروي أن الخلق العظيم " هو " الدين العظيم.

segments: 1. My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ahmad bin Muhammed, from his father, from Fadala, from Aban, from Abu’l-Jaroud, from Abu Ja’far, peace be upon him, with regards to the saying of Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He: «Indeed, you are of an exalted moral character.» [68:4] He said: It is Islam. It was also reported that exalted moral character is the Exalted Religion.
en.basel-kadem.text: 1. My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ahmad bin Muhammed, from his father, from Fadala, from Aban, from Abu’l-Jaroud, from Abu Ja’far, peace be upon him, with regards to the saying of Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He: «Indeed, you are of an exalted moral character.» [68:4] He said: It is Islam. It was also reported that exalted moral character is the Exalted Religion.
